channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.description:
Dog poo inside the gated children's play area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillingdon Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Outside 29a Chapel Road - Poor Road Surface slightly sunken, 9th March
item.description:
Chapel Road - has sunken slightly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaners abandoned their work a week ago rubbish sacks left decaying, 9th March
item.description:
Over a week ago, street cleaners did a substantial cleanup on Brief St SE5. They left what they collected in rubbish sacks but it’s been lying on the pavements for over a week and no one has collected them. Very soon now all the rubbish will be back in the streets the job seems to have been left half done. Please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burton Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 9th March
item.description:
Dog poo near tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Keeton's Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 9th March
item.description:
Dog poo near bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chambers Street, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Outside 24 Grafton Crescent, 9th March
item.description:
Loose paving stone
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Grafton Crescent, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog fouling, 9th March
item.description:
After the area was cleaned last week (thank you), unfortunately three new instances of dog fouling have appeared on the pavement (west side) in the past few days. All photos are from this morning. Please check the entire stretch from Stumps Hill Lane to Braeside again. It would also be helpful if enforcement in this area could be increased, as it appears that some dog owners may have made a habit of this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near 107 Kilburn Park Road, NW6 5FQ, 9th March
item.description:
A coffee table containing glass next to Hansel Road bus stop MV

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Items dumped in and around trolley, 9th March
item.description:
As title. Think this happen over the weekend. Blocks pavement access. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving stones dumped on the street at the south end of Oakhurst Grove, 9th March
item.description:
This issue has previously been reported. I received an email on March 5th to say that the issue had been resolved and the case was closed. But the rubble is still there. Please can it be cleared. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Oakhurst Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foxes have strewn rubbish from litter bin all over pavement, 9th March
item.description:
Litter all over pavement near bus stop litter bin. Including food waste and glass bottles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint and rubbish spillage, 9th March
item.description:
White paint spillage and rubbish in road. The white paint has been spread along Friary Road and Holbeck Row. Please can this be pressure washed off and rubbish cleaned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92-94, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs emptying, 9th March
item.description:
Don’t think this has been emptied in a while, weeks. And there is litter all round the bus stop daily. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on pavement up from 40 Northcross road to palmerston pub, 9th March
item.description:
As above. Dog poo outside 40 Northcross road and neighbouring properties up to palmerston pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Burnt out van next to pile of rubbish., 9th March
item.description:
Pile of rubbish was on fire LFB called and now put out the fire but burnt out van and rubbish remains on road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by clothes bin, 9th March
item.description:
Lots of flytipping, bags ripped open, nappies etc by the clothes bin near nisa.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle blocking line of sight and seems abandoned, 9th March
item.description:
This vehicle is blocking line of sight for cars and pedestrians, from Cavendish avenue in particular. Today there was a near miss again. The vehicle hasn't moved for at least 3 weeks and is causing dangerous situations.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tyndall Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
